name: imali-dev
description: Dev launcher for the 1Remit/iMali stack (Foundry contracts live alongside the server/admin/consumer Node apps).

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,admin,consumer,merchant -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow "cd server && npm run dev" "cd admin && npm run dev" "cd consumer && npm run dev" "cd merchant && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently -k -n server,admin -c green,cyan "cd server && npm run dev" "cd admin && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:consumer: concurrently -k -n server,consumer -c green,magenta "cd server && npm run dev" "cd consumer && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:merchant: concurrently -k -n server,merchant -c green,yellow "cd server && npm run dev" "cd merchant && npm run dev"
